privileged_info_summary: The genealogy_age_validator task uses a synthetic dataset of 17 genealogy records generated by setup_task.sh in the LibreOffice Calc environment. Data is entirely generated (no external sources). The dataset includes historical records with Known Birth Years (column B), Record Dates (column C), and Recorded Ages (column D). Calculations are: Implied Birth Year = Record Date - Recorded Age; Flag = 'INVESTIGATE' if |Known Birth - Implied Birth| > 2 years, else 'OK'. Verified example: Sarah Johnson (Born 1850, Record Date 1895, Age 40) yields Implied Birth 1855 (difference of 5 years) → INVESTIGATE flag. Dataset contains 7 records requiring investigation and 10 records marked OK.
